howItWorks.intro: This divorce cost calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Cost Range
rules.formula: Cost = Base Range × Child Factor × Asset Factor
rules.explanation: Base cost adjusted for custody and asset complexity.

howItWorks.outro: Laws vary by jurisdiction and change frequently. This is not legal advice — consult a licensed attorney.

faq.question: How much does divorce cost?
faq.answer: From $500 for simple uncontested to $100,000+ for complex contested cases.

faq.question: How to reduce divorce costs?
faq.answer: Agree on as much as possible beforehand. Mediation is much cheaper than litigation.

faq.question: Is the Divorce Cost Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard legal matters formulas trusted by individuals navigating legal issues. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What divorce type should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate divorce type value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

sections.title: What Is the Divorce Cost Calculator?
sections.body: The Divorce Cost Calculator is a free online tool designed for individuals navigating legal issues who need quick, accurate calculations in the legal matters space. By entering your divorce type, children involved, asset complexity, you get instant results including low estimate, high estimate, estimated timeline. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting low estimate right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In legal matters, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by individuals navigating legal issues worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to understand your legal situation with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your divorce type and need to find the right low estimate. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your low estimate, high estimate, estimated timeline. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.

tips: Double-check your divorce type before calculating — even small input errors can significantly change your results.
